main.description: A verifiable check-in event for a specific service streak.

originService.description: The NSID of the service where the streak event occurred.

policy.description: The URI of the policy governing this streak.

subject.description: The name of the habit (e.g., 'Daily Coding', 'Morning Run').

streakSequence.description: The current total count of successful intervals/days in this specific streak.

streakDate.description: The explicit date this check-in is for (YYYY-MM-DD). Useful for handling timezone boundaries manually.

checkinsInInterval.description: Progress within the current cadence interval (e.g., 2 if this is the second check-in of the week).

note.description: A short note or comment about this check-in (e.g. 'Ran 5km').

value.description: An optional numeric metric associated with this check-in (e.g. distance, weight, count).

prev.description: CID of the previous check-in record in the sequence.

inventoryRef.description: CID of the inventory record associated with this check-in.

freezeDates.description: Explicit dates (YYYY-MM-DD) being covered by streak freezes in this check-in.

witness.description: Optional third-party attestation of the event.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this check-in record was created.

witness.description: A cryptographic attestation from a third-party service.

did.description: The DID of the witness service.

sig.description: The cryptographic signature of the witness.

subject.description: The CID of the record being witnessed.
